summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AcertosPWA - PWA da unidade Labelview. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend UI tests verified all required features.
critical_code_review_comments: PWA correctly displays 'Transmill Auto' instead of 'AgitoAuto' - slug 'agitoauto' is used in URL but display name is correct
Unit colors (red #FF0000 primary, green #00FF00 secondary) are correctly applied to login screen, footer, and buttons
All 6 service cards are visible and legible with dark text on white background
Service modal correctly includes photo upload and location fields
Profile screen shows all required personal data fields (Nome, Email, CPF, Telefone) and protection summary
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: AcertosPWA testing complete. All features working correctly: 1) Login screen with unit colors (red/green), 2) Unit name 'Transmill Auto' displayed correctly, 3) Services screen with 6 cards (Roubo/Furto, Guincho, Pane Seca, Pane Elétrica, Troca Pneu, Chaveiro), 4) Service modal with photo upload and location fields, 5) Profile screen with personal data and protection summary, 6) Footer using unit's primary color, 7) Version v2.38.0 confirmed, 8) All backend endpoints working (solicitar-assistencia-v2, labelview/service-requests, pwa/login, pwa/unidade, pwa/minha-protecao)

backend_tests.description: Login returns user data with required fields

frontend_tests.description: Login screen displays with unit colors and correct name
All 6 service cards visible and legible
Modal opens with photo and location fields
Shows personal data and protection summary

features_verified.tela_servicos_6_cards: ✅ PASS - All 6 cards visible: Roubo/Furto, Guincho, Pane Seca, Pane Elétrica, Troca Pneu, Chaveiro
features_verified.modal_solicitacao_servico: ✅ PASS - Modal opens with photo upload and location fields
features_verified.campo_foto_localizacao: ✅ PASS - Photo field (optional) and location field (required) present
features_verified.tela_perfil_dados_pessoais: ✅ PASS - Shows Nome, Email, CPF, Telefone
features_verified.footer_cor_primaria: ✅ PASS - Footer uses unit's primary color (red)
